title: Real Estate Agents Principal Forum Mossel Bay and surrounds
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The primary objective of our...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - The primary objective of our Principal Forum is to ensure that the municipal bylaws regarding \"For Sale\" and \"On Show\" advertising boards are upheld and consistently enforced.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - The primary objective of our Principal Forum is to ensure that the municipal bylaws regarding \"For Sale\" and \"On Show\" advertising boards are upheld and consistently enforced."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"We believe that by working together with the local authorities, we can maintain the aesthetic appeal and integrity of our town, ultimately benefiting our residents, businesses, and visitors alike."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In addition, the Forum serves as a unified body and mouthpiece, ensuring that communication with stakeholders, authorities, and the broader community takes place from one central and consistent source.","html":"In addition, the Forum serves as a unified body and mouthpiece, ensuring that communication with stakeholders, authorities, and the broader community takes place from one central and consistent source."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Upcoming MeetingWe cordially invite the Principals of all Real Estate Agencies of Mossel Bay and surrounds to join us for our Members Forum meeting, scheduled to take place at Misty Valley on 12 September 2025 at 09:00.","html":"Upcoming Meeting
We cordially invite the Principals of all Real Estate Agencies of Mossel Bay and surrounds to join us for our Members Forum meeting, scheduled to take place at Misty Valley on 12 September 2025 at 09:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tickets will be available through Quicket, and an email with the Agenda and further details will be sent out shortly.","html":"Tickets will be available through Quicket, and an email with the Agenda and further details will be sent out shortly."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We look forward to engaging and exploring ways to enhance our town's beauty and functionality. We believe that by collaborating and sharing ideas, we can make Mossel Bay an even more wonderful place to live, work, and visit.","html":"We look forward to engaging and exploring ways to enhance our town's beauty and functionality. We believe that by collaborating and sharing ideas, we can make Mossel Bay an even more wonderful place to live, work, and visit."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you are a Principal and have never received correspondence from us, you are welcome to send  your Company and personal detail, email address and contact detail to [email protected].","html":"If you are a Principal and have never received correspondence from us, you are welcome to send your Company and personal detail, email address and contact detail to [email protected]."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Committee:","html":"Committee:"},{"type":"list","items":["Yolande Botha","Manie Oosthuizen","Ronel de Beer","Samantha de Beer"],"ordered":false},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Contact Cathy from EVO Home Loans 082 446 6076You’re much more likely to get a home loan when you use an evo expert."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
